name: Chocolate-Covered Almonds
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy saucepan, mix together the almonds, sugar, and water over medium-high heat.
Stir until the mixture has a sandy texture and coats the almonds (about 5 minutes).
2. While stirring, push the mixture up against the sides of the pan to encourage crystal formation.
3. Spread the almonds on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and refrigerate until firm.
4. Warm the chocolate in a heatproof bowl set over a saucepan of simmering water until it is just melted (about 88°F).
5. Place the cooled, hardened almonds into the warm chocolate and stir vigorously to prevent clumping.
6. Add the remaining chocolate and continue stirring until all almonds are thoroughly coated.
7. Transfer the coated almonds to a plate with powdered sugar and roll them to evenly distribute the powder.
